description_long: This is a rectangular mattress with a light gray, quilted top surface featuring a repeating pattern of large, circular tufted impressions. The sides are covered in a contrasting black fabric with subtle horizontal wave-like stitching, and two vertical light gray handles or accents are visible on the longer sides. The mattress appears to be of medium thickness, suitable for a standard bed frame, and is likely constructed with a combination of foam and fabric materials. The top surface looks soft and cushioned, while the side panels provide structural support and aesthetic contrast. There is a small, oval-shaped brand label centered on the longer sides, adding a touch of detail to the otherwise minimalist design.
description: A medium-thickness mattress with a light gray, quilted top and black side panels featuring wave stitching and gray handles. The top has a circular tufted pattern and a small brand label is visible on the sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the light gray, quilted top with circular tufting and the black side panel without visible handles or labels.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the black panel with two vertical gray handles and a centered oval brand label, along with the quilted top.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the quilted top and plain black side panel without handles or labels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, with two gray handles and a centered oval brand label on the black side panel.
attribute_brand_label: A small, oval-shaped brand label is visible and centered on the longer black side panels. The label is light gray with a darker border, but the text or logo is not legible.
attribute_pattern_design: The top surface features a quilted pattern with large, evenly spaced circular tufted impressions.
attribute_edge_piping: There is a subtle, continuous edge piping running around the perimeter of the mattress, matching the light gray color of the top surface and providing a clean border between the top and side panels.
